title: Physically plausible multi-person 3D motion generation (working title)
authors: Colin, M., Wang, Y., et al.
venue: Work in progress — targeting a CVPR 2027 submission
contribution: Ongoing research at the University of Alberta's Vision & Learning Lab (Prof. Li Cheng), with Yilin Wang. Music- and text-prompt-conditioned multi-person 3D dance generation, with a focus on the physical plausibility of the motion (ground-plane estimation, contacts, foot-skating, interpenetration, physics-based metrics on AIOZ-GDANCE).
